message:
fix(service): return error instead of panicking when call() precedes poll_ready()

ConcurrencyLimitService::call() previously panicked if called before
poll_ready(). Now returns ConcurrencyLimitError::LimitExceeded while
preserving the service's in-flight acquisition state so the service
remains usable after the error.

Also restructure ConcurrencyLimitFuture using pin_project with an enum
state (Inner holding the future + Option<OwnedSemaphorePermit>, or
Error). When the inner future completes, permit.take() immediately
releases the semaphore permit even if the caller retains the future
value. Previously, the permit was held for the entire lifetime of the
wrapper, meaning a caller holding a completed future would unnecessarily
block concurrency capacity. The future also no longer requires F: Unpin.

Add tests: call_without_poll_ready_returns_limit_exceeded,
future_releases_permit_when_ready_even_if_retained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
